first_run.rationale: The score is identical across both evaluations. The justification, strengths, and primary concerns (lack of NestJS and Kotlin) are substantively the same, with only minor variations in wording. The only significant change is the third concern, which shifts from specific testing tools (Vitest/Playwright) to thin React experience. This change is not plausibly linked to the candidate's location (Berlin vs. Bucharest) and falls within the category of normal run-to-run variation where the model highlights a different secondary weakness from the same resume.
